name: Buried Secrets of The Bible With Albert Lin
original_name: Buried Secrets of The Bible With Albert Lin
overview: Albert Lin investigates two great stories of the Bible: Could real events lie behind the parting of the Red Sea and the destruction of Sodom and Gomorrah?
